posts.author: Pochoux (Brondex)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear Monday team,

Today we use Monday with our teams in several countries,

Can you create

  • a global board translation system by user location
  • or a translation column that we can add on our boards to translate two columns between them?

At your disposal to discuss in more detail on the subject
